articles.title: Cardano (ADA) Receives Approval To Be Listed In Japan
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) has recently secured another win in its long repertoire of wins lately. The native coin of Cardano, ADA, has now been approved to be listed in Japan, which features one of the hardest listing requirements in the world. Only a handful of coins have been able to receive approval to be listed on exchanges in Japan, and ADA just became one of them. Japan has always been...

articles.title: Aave is Exploring Solana, Avalanche, Layer 2 Expansion
articles.description: Aave is considering expanding its operations to include Solana, Avalanche, and Layer 2 solutions. This move aims to enhance its decentralized finance offerings and reach a broader user base by tapping into the unique features and benefits of these blockchain networks.

Celsius Network Lends Support to Cardano ($ADA)
articles.description: Cryptocurrency lender Celsius Network is set to add Cardano’s ADA later this month for both borrowing and lending. According to its CEO Alex Mashinsky, users will be able to take out ADA-backed loans on August 19. Mashinsky also revealed on Twitter that users can earn 4.05% on their ADA holdings by lending the cryptocurrency on […]
